perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Non-live action video: 2D animation. A bald male character with thick eyebrows is looking at a small rectangular box or phone with a serious expression. (2) A sequence shows him imagining himself with medical bandages on his eye, nose, and cheek; the background changes to a swirling purple pattern. (3) He poses as a hero with a sword and cape against a background of fire. (4) The character stands at a counter in a pharmacy-like setting, talking to a shopkeeper wearing a white coat. (5) After buying a box, he applies a large white gauze bandage over his right eye. (6) He takes multiple selfies with an old green digital camera, striking various poses and looking intensely into the lens. (7) In a fantasy sequence, he walks into a classroom where several classmates are shown screaming with heart-shaped eyes and exaggerated expressions of awe.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic male voice begins a fast-paced monologue. Upbeat, heroic orchestral music with strong brass and percussion elements starts in the background. (2) Sudden 'whoosh' and fire sound effects (SFX) play as he imagines becoming a manga hero. (3) The music stops briefly for dialogue; a second, calmer male voice (shopkeeper) is heard asking a question. (4) Intense, suspenseful violin-led music starts as he puts on the eye bandage. (5) Repeated mechanical 'click-clack' camera shutter SFX play as he takes selfies. (6) A chorus of loud, high-pitched female and male screams of 'A Chiu so handsome!' (阿啾好帥) and general cheering fills the audio track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '阿啾小劇場' (A Chiu Mini-Theater) appears at the top in a playful font. (2) Hook: '眼睛貼布帥到哭==' (Eye bandage is handsome enough to cry) is fixed in the middle, expressing humorous exaggeration. (3) Functional: '完整影片在Youtube' (Full video on YouTube) at the bottom. (4) Functional: Subtitles throughout translate the dialogue, including phrases like 'Cover your eyes with gauze', 'Legendary band-aid positions', and 'Shonen manga protagonist'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Internal monologue/Hook -> Dialogue/Purchase -> Narcissistic Montage -> Fantasy Result

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main character (A Chiu), 1 male shopkeeper, 1 male classmate, 2 female classmates in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald male cartoon character wearing a simple black t-shirt, known for exaggerated facial expressions and thick black eyebrows.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Varies between a plain dark room, a pharmacy counter with shelves of medicine, and a bright classroom setting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience through a comedic animation about 'Chuunibyou' tendencies—specifically the desire to wear medical accessories like bandages solely to look like a cool anime character, and the narcissistic fantasy that follows.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration, 'A Chiu' bald character design, and variety-show style static text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses exaggerated anime tropes (eye bandages, dark power effects) to create a relatable comedic situation regarding vanity and youth culture.
